caption: A man with a dark beard, wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, is positioned in front of a professional microphone held by a shock mount. The background consists of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a t-shirt with a logo that includes the word "Authentic" and the phrase "MIND POWR" underneath. Throughout the sequence, the man reacts with increasing emotion. He begins with a subtle smile and a squint, which transitions into a wider grin and a laugh. By the final moment, he is laughing heartily with his mouth wide open and his head tilted back. The camera remains stationary, keeping the man and the microphone in a close-up shot as his facial expressions shift from amusement to laughter.
